description: Create ESLint and Prettier configuration files for the entire Nx monorepo. Set up a root eslint.config.js using flat config format (ESLint 9), a .prettierrc for Prettier settings, a .prettierignore, and per-project eslint.config.js files. Add lint targets to each project.json and lint/format scripts to root package.json. Run lint and format on the codebase, fixing any issues so the repo passes cleanly.
steps: Create root eslint.config.js (flat config format) with: base TypeScript rules from typescript-eslint, import of @nx/eslint-plugin for workspace boundaries, Prettier integration via eslint-config-prettier (disables conflicting rules). Export as default array of config objects.

Create apps/web/eslint.config.js that extends the root config and adds Angular ESLint rules: component-selector with prefix rm- and type element, directive-selector with prefix rm- and type attribute, template rules from @angular-eslint/template
Create apps/api/eslint.config.js that extends the root config for Node.js/Lambda TypeScript code
Create apps/infra/eslint.config.js that extends the root config for CDK TypeScript code
Create libs/shared/eslint.config.js that extends the root config for the shared library
Create .prettierrc with settings: singleQuote: true, trailingComma: 'none', printWidth: 100, tabWidth: 2, semi: true, bracketSpacing: true, arrowParens: 'always'
Create .prettierignore that ignores: dist/, node_modules/, pnpm-lock.yaml, .nx/, coverage/
Add lint targets to each project.json (apps/web, apps/api, apps/infra, libs/shared) using @nx/eslint:lint executor with lintFilePatterns pointing to their respective src directories
Add scripts to root package.json: 'lint': 'nx run-many -t lint', 'format': 'prettier --write .', 'format:check': 'prettier --check .'
Run pnpm format to auto-format all files with Prettier
Run pnpm lint --fix to auto-fix any ESLint issues across the workspace
Manually fix any remaining lint errors that auto-fix cannot resolve
Verify pnpm lint passes cleanly with no errors
Verify pnpm format:check passes cleanly (all files already formatted)
acceptance_criteria: Root eslint.config.js exists and uses flat config format with TypeScript ESLint rules
Each project (web, api, infra, shared) has its own eslint.config.js extending root
Angular ESLint rules enforce rm- prefix for selectors in apps/web config
All project.json files have lint targets using @nx/eslint:lint executor
Root package.json has lint, format, and format:check scripts
pnpm lint runs successfully with no errors across all projects
pnpm format:check passes (all source files are properly formatted)
verification: Run pnpm nx run-many -t lint and confirm all projects pass with exit code 0
Run pnpm prettier --check . and confirm all files are formatted with exit code 0
